mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.matched_phenotypes: gastrointestinal inflammation, hyperaminoacidemias (Valinemia, Leucinemia, Isoleucinemia), recurrent viral infections, neonatal and infant deaths
pustules, neurodegenerative symptoms, hepatosplenomegaly, progressive neurological decline leading to death during childhood or young adulthood

mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.disease_name: Immunodeficiency with IgG Subclass Deficiencies and Granulomatosis (Wiskott Aldrich Syndrome)
mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.matched_phenotypes: recurrent viral infections, impaired immune response, thrombocytopenia, susceptibility to bacterial infections, predisposition to autoimmune disorders, increased risk of malignancies, mortality in late adolescence or early adulthood
severe neuronal dysfunction, hypotonia, seizures, characteristic facial features, liver involvement, failure to thrive, feeding difficulties, respiratory distress, and premature demise
recurrent staphylococcal skin abscesses, eosinophilic esophagitis, asthma, allergies, chronic sinopulmonary infection, frequent otitis media, and elevated serum immunoglobulin E levels

mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.disease_name: Classic congenital adrenal hyperplasia due to 21-hydroxylase deficiency, salt wasting form
mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.matched_phenotypes: salt wasting crisis, hyponatremia, dehydration, electrolyte imbalance, growth retardation, ambiguous genitalia, and premature death from complications such as sepsis or Addisonian Crisis
metabolic acidosis, encephalopathy, myopathy, ketotic episodes, vomiting, lethargy, coma, and sudden unexplained death
recurrent pyogenic infections, poor antibody responses, decreased IgG levels, normal complement components, and mild splenomegaly
bone marrow failure, short stature, congenital anomalies, sun sensitivity, and increased risk of cancer
coarse facies, corneal cloudiness, skeletal defects, hearing loss, cardiac valve thickening, pulmonary fibrosis, and mental deterioration
